creator: taoka@infonets.hiroshima-u.ac.jp
text:
[update] japanese/Wnn6-lib

Recently, the sources of Wnn6 client library was open.
So we can compile it on a ELF system.

By this updating of this port, libraies and so on are made
from the sources.

Fix: Please run the following:

cd /usr/ports
zcat Wnn6-lib.patch.gz | patch -p0

and delete the following files:

japanese/Wnn6-lib/files/copyright.jp
